name: nestjs-harness-plugin
description: Drop-in harness for NestJS — structures AI-assisted feature development via request/work specs

scripts.dev:sync: node -e "const fs=require('fs-extra');const path=require('path');const src='skeleton/.claude/commands';const dst='.claude/commands';fs.removeSync(dst);fs.ensureDirSync(dst);for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src)){fs.copySync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f))}console.log('[dev:sync] '+fs.readdirSync(dst).length+' slash commands copied to .claude/commands/ (gitignored)');"

author: HaSungJe
